description_long: This is a large commercial jet airliner with a streamlined fuselage, swept-back wings, and three prominent turbofan engines—two mounted under each wing and one integrated at the base of the vertical stabilizer. The airplane features a T-tail configuration, with the horizontal stabilizer mounted atop the vertical fin, and a distinctive blue tail fin. The wings are low-mounted and exhibit a moderate sweep, with no visible winglets. The cockpit is positioned at the very front of the fuselage, with a series of cockpit windows providing forward visibility. The landing gear is not visible in these images, suggesting it is likely retractable and stowed within the fuselage and wings. The exterior is primarily white with gray wings and a blue tail, giving it a modern, commercial appearance.
description: A large, white commercial jet airliner with swept low-mounted wings, three turbofan engines, and a blue T-tail. The cockpit is forward-mounted, and the design is sleek and modern.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose, cockpit windows, both underwing engines, and the central engine at the tail base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full fuselage length, wing sweep, underwing engine, and blue T-tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail engine, T-tail configuration, and the symmetry of the wings and stabilizers.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the fuselage, wing, underwing engine, and blue T-tail from the opposite side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, moderately swept wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Three turbofan engines: two underwing-mounted and one rear fuselage-mounted at the base of the vertical stabilizer.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer mounted at the top.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable tricycle configuration based on typical design.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage.
